name: Barbecued Grilled Pork Tenderloin (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow, nonreactive dish, combine the mustard, barbecue sauce, and olive oil. Season with rosemary, salt, and pepper.
2. Turn the butterflied pieces of pork tenderloin in the mixture to coat evenly. Marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to an hour while preparing side dishes.
3. Preheat your grill or broiler. Broil the tenderloin on each side for 6 to 7 minutes only.
4. Let the tenderloin rest on a cutting board for 10 minutes before slicing it against the grain.
Yield: 3 to 4 servings
